Core Features

EVERYTHING YOU NEED

Master the markets with our comprehensive suite of trading tools and education

📹

Pre-Market Zoom

Every morning our expert traders run a live pre-market analysis session. Get real-time insights on market setup and key levels before the bell.

⚡

Live Trading Alerts

Receive instant notifications on trade opportunities. Our team shares entries, exits, and risk management in real-time.

🎓

Nightly Workshops

Every evening dive deep into trading strategies, technical analysis, and market psychology with our expert-led sessions.

🤖

Deepvue AI Tools

Access cutting-edge AI-powered scanning and analysis tools. Identify high-probability setups with machine learning precision.

Why 28 days instead of monthly?

We align with the 4-week trading cycle used by prop firms and professional traders. This gives you time to apply what you learn and see real results.
